I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only the tests with the `Category=Integration` trait in their xUnit project. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-ae55cf41b9f040ce801c245af5fce319 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All **5 integration tests** passed successfully. The command used:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This filters xUnit tests using the `--filter` flag with the `Category=Integration` trait expression. All 5 matching tests succeeded with 0 failures.
